title: Summarizing Podcasts
scenario: Given a podcast episode of approximately 60 minutes, write a summary of no more than 150 words that captures the main topics, key takeaways, and supporting arguments.
constraints: Must include key takeaways and supporting evidence
Summary should be no more than 150 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary meets the word count requirement.
Verify that the summary accurately captures the main topics of the podcast episode.
Check if the key takeaways listed in the summary match the ones mentioned in the podcast.
Ensure the summary supports its claims with relevant evidence from the podcast episode.
